form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.47) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and eight places from 12 starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.47) at this track in a Grade 3/4, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and eight places from 12 starts. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 23.02 in a 2.25 lengths win at this track over 400m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional and went on to clock 23.02 in a 2.25 lengths win at this track over 400m. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room and lost momentum rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by a neck at this track (23.27) beating Nakita Moira in a Grade 5 on March 12. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by a neck at this track (23.27) beating Nakita Moira in a Grade 5 on March 12. Solid claims this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped in the air at box rise; Shortly after appeared to gallop awkwardly.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (15.91) over 272m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (15.91) over 272m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Completed the race with muzzle displaced.

form.formComment: Failed to finish last start, but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (15.74) beating Rebel Force in a Grade 3/4 on April 4. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish last start, but before that won by 2.25 lengths at this track (15.74) beating Rebel Force in a Grade 3/4 on April 4. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact upon entering the back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.42) over 388m at Gosford. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 2.5 lengths fourth (22.42) over 388m at Gosford. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (15.83) over 272m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last start (15.83) over 272m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by half a length in 15.81, beating Kenzies Comet. Last start finished 5th on February 27 over 272m at this track behind Kenzies Comet beaten 9 lengths (16.44) in a Grade 3/4. Prepared to overlook.
